meta.title: Eubacterium saphenus sp. nov., Isolated from Human Periodontal Pockets
meta.journalTitle: International Journal of Systematic and Evolutionary Microbiology

abstractHtml: A new species, Eubacterium saphenus sp. nov., established on the basis of the results of DNA-DNA hybridization, was proposed for strains isolated from human periodontal pockets. Differential characteristics are given.
